$1,325 / 2br - 925ft2 - Wauwatosa 2 Bdrm, 1 Bath Near MCW (Wauwatosa)

1506 N. 116th Street, Wauwatosa, WI 53226

1506 N. 116th Street near vliet

google map

2BR / 1Ba 925ft2 available jun 1
rent period: monthly
cats are OK - purrr
apartment
w/d hookups
detached garage
no smoking
air conditioning

QR Code Link to This Post

Beautifully updated, clean, quiet 2 bedroom, 1 bath apartment in the City of Wauwatosa. Rent is $1325.00. Kitchen and bathroom includes new cabinets, high resolution countertops, STAINLESS STEEL APPLIANCES: Range, Refrigerator, Dishwasher, Microwave, AC included. Patio door leading to nice balcony. GARAGE parking plus extra spot. Large storage locker, private laundry machines available. 12 month lease. Very convenient location. 1506 N. 116th Street. Close to Medical College of Wisconsin. A cat is OK with an additional charge of $50 per month. Full size washer and dryer is available at extra charge. Please call (414) 807-453five for more information or to set up a showing. Available 6/1/26.
